title: Mirror Report — GOVERNANCE — epos_ecosystem
body:
**Mirror Report: Unlocking Governance Potential**

WHAT WE FOUND: Our diagnostic revealed that your small business has a Sovereign Alignment Score of 10/25, indicating significant opportunities for improvement in governance. Specifically, we identified key gaps in Data Sovereignty and SaaS Dependency, with the latter being a high-severity concern. This means that your business likely relies heavily on third-party services and cloud storage, which may compromise data sovereignty and create vulnerabilities. As a result, data ownership and access controls may not be well-defined, putting your business at risk.

THE REAL COST: The current state of governance may be costing your business in terms of data security, compliance, and overall efficiency. By relying on third-party services, you may be exposing your business to potential data breaches, intellectual property theft, and reputational damage. Furthermore, the lack of control over your data may lead to inefficiencies in data management, resulting in wasted time and resources.

THE PATH FORWARD: To address these concerns, we recommend prioritizing the highest-leverage indicators. Firstly, addressing the Data Sovereignty gap by implementing robust data ownership and access controls will help mitigate potential risks. Secondly, reducing SaaS Dependency by developing a strategic plan to minimize reliance on third-party services will enhance your business's overall resilience. By taking these steps, you can begin to regain control over your data and improve your governance posture.

WHAT CHANGES IN 30 DAYS: Within the next 30 days, we anticipate measurable improvements in your business's governance, with a medium confidence level. Specifically, you can expect to see progress in defining data ownership and access controls, as well as initial steps towards reducing SaaS Dependency. These changes will lay the foundation for long-term improvements in your business's overall governance and data sovereignty.

SOVEREIGN ALIGNMENT SCORE: With a current score of 10/25, your business has a significant opportunity to improve its governance posture and regain control over its data. By addressing the identified gaps and implementing targeted changes, you can expect to see meaningful improvements in your Sovereign Alignment Score over time, ultimately enhancing your business's resilience and competitiveness.
